description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden wardrobe with a natural wood grain finish and a rectangular shape. The front features three vertical doors, with the central door incorporating a large, rectangular mirror panel. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle for easy opening. The sides and top of the wardrobe are finished in the same wood texture, while the back panel appears to be a plain, lighter-colored material. The wardrobe is designed to store clothing and personal items, making it suitable for placement in bedrooms, hallways, or even urban residential entryways.
description: A tall, wooden wardrobe with three doors, a central mirror, and round knob handles, finished in a natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three doors, a large central mirror, and round knob handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wood grain panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, light-colored back panel with no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a plain wood grain panel similar to the left side.
